name: terraform-terragrunt-skills
description: Terraform, Terragrunt, and GitHub skills for Codex and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: IaC and GitHub skill pack for infrastructure and repository workflows.
interface.longDescription: Reusable Terraform, Terragrunt, GitHub, and GitHub Actions skills for infrastructure authoring, review, validation, and repository automation.
defaultPrompt: Use terraform to scaffold a reusable module.
Review this Terraform directory for risky issues.
Use terragrunt to design a multi-environment layout.
Use github-actions to review this workflow for permission and fork-safety issues.
Use github to add CODEOWNERS and a pull request template for this repository.
